notes: Validated manually through invoke on 2026-05-19 against the current NetEaseMusic window layout.
The search-box click point uses --app com.netease.163music so the driver activates NetEaseMusic before clicking.
The result click point targets the first left-list Cure For Me result observed after searching AURORA Cure For Me.
The result double-click is validated with click_interval_ms=80; without an interval, the app observed the multi-click sequence unreliably.
This case should be treated as fixed-layout coverage, not as semantic music selection.
